# Mathematical status

<!-- Generated by scripts/render_status.py from THEOREMS.yml; do not edit. -->

This is a rendered summary of the active theorem chain. [`THEOREMS.yml`](THEOREMS.yml) is the single source of truth for theorem status, dependencies, checkers, and review state; full statements and qualification live in the canonical sources.

A repository checker is evidence for reproducibility, not external review. “Proved” means that the canonical source contains a written argument.

| ID | Theorem | Status | Canonical source | Dependencies | Checker | External review | Supersedes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Foundational Keller collision | proved | [source](verified/FOUNDATIONAL_GEOMETRY.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_counterexample_independent.py) | Lean certificate | — |

| C1 | Cancellation construction | proved for every m,r >= 1 | [source](cancellation/CONSTRUCTION.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_master_universal.py) | none | `case tables` |
| B1 | Boundary exhaustion | proved in codimension one for both active families | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/boundary-exhaustion.tex) | `W1`, `C1` | [checker](scripts/audit_boundary_exhaustion_independent.py) | none | `chart-only arguments` |
| S1 | Stable boundary functoriality | proved | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/stable-functoriality.tex) | — | — | none | — |

| M1 | Degreewise finite count | proved for every N >= 4 | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/main.tex) | `B1`, `S1`, `P1` | [checker](scripts/verify_full_boundary_diagram.py) | none | `tau(N-1)` |
| D1 | Decorated moduli | proved: dimension N-3 on an explicit open for N >= 4 | [source](extended-geometry/DECORATED_NORMALIZATION_INVARIANT.md) | `S1`, `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_decorated_normalization.py) | none | `degree-five-only moduli` |
| F2 | Full-cover faithfulness | proved for normalized admissible seeds | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/decorated-normalization.tex) | `D1`, external: stable plane descent and fixed-curve rigidity | [checker](scripts/verify_affine_branch_mark_audit.py) | under audit | `six-orbit bound` |
| R1 | Rank-two all-degree descent | proved for every normalized admissible seed of degree N >= 5 | [source](extended-geometry/RANK_TWO_SYMPLECTIC_DESCENT.md) | `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_four_residue_recurrence.py) | none | `degree-five/six-only descent` |

The index covers the active dependency chain, not every consequence or external reproduction in the repository. Those results remain scoped in their own canonical notes and do not become dependencies unless listed here.
